title: MhFFa30109
description: Don't expect to see the whole picture
body:
# **Welcome to MhFFa30109**

This is advanced horror mod, made for players who tired of dwellers and other low quality projects. MhFFa inspired by the fear of unknown, and disigned around this feture.

<details>
<summary>Functionality in brief (**Hightly recomend to not check**)</summary>

Mod introduce:

- Advanced event system integrated in your minecraft world.

- A lot of unique horror events. You will never know what can happen.

- **Best Paranoia simulator**.

</details>

And remember! Do not expect to see the whole picture.
